ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fluids" (
  "fluid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fluid */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fluid (e.g., water, lava) */,
  "localized_name" TEXT /* Localized name of the fluid for display purposes */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature of the fluid in Kelvin */,
  "luminosity" INTEGER /* Luminosity of the fluid (0-15) */,
  "density" INTEGER /* Density of the fluid in kg/m³ */,
  "viscosity" INTEGER /* Viscosity of the fluid in Pa·s */,
  "placeable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the fluid can be placed in the game */,
  "block_id" TEXT /* Minecraft ID of the fluid block */,
  "block_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block class associated with the fluid */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the fluid in hex format (e.g., #0000FF) */,
  "flow_rate" INTEGER /* Flow rate of the fluid */,
  "sound_id" TEXT /* ID of the sound effect associated with the fluid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fluid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fluids_block_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_class_id") REFERENCES block_classes ("block_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block class associated with the block */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the block (e.g., water, lava) */,
  "localized_name" TEXT /* Localized name of the block for display purposes */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature of the block in Kelvin */,
  "luminosity" INTEGER /* Luminosity of the block (0-15) */,
  "density" INTEGER /* Density of the block in kg/m³ */,
  "viscosity" INTEGER /* Viscosity of the block in Pa·s (if applicable) */,
  "placeable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the block can be placed in the game */,
  "block_class" TEXT /* Class of the block (e.g., cofh.asmhooks.block.BlockWater) */,
  "blast_resistance" INTEGER /* Blast resistance of the block */,
  "hardness" INTEGER /* Hardness of the block */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material associated with the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_block_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_class_id") REFERENCES block_classes ("block_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_classes" (
  "block_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block class */,
  "block_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the block class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block class */,
  "parent_block_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent block class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_classes_parent_block_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_block_class_id") REFERENCES block_classes ("block_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fluid_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "fluid_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fluid the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., boiling point, freezing point) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fluid_properties_fluid_id FOREIGN KEY ("fluid_id") REFERENCES fluids ("fluid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., hardness, blast resistance) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_properties_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, mod developer, server admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity being accessed (e.g., fluid, block) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fluid_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "fluid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fluid the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the fluid */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fluid_versions_fluid_id FOREIGN KEY ("fluid_id") REFERENCES fluids ("fluid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the block */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_versions_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., fluid, block) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_metadata_entity_type FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type") REFERENCES fluids ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_metadata_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES fluids ("fluid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_metadata_entity_type FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type") REFERENCES blocks ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_metadata_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fluid_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "fluid_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first fluid in the interaction */,
  "fluid_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second fluid in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., mixing, reaction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fluid_interactions_fluid_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("fluid_id_2") REFERENCES fluids ("fluid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fluid_interactions_fluid_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("fluid_id_1") REFERENCES fluids ("fluid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "block_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first block in the interaction */,
  "block_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second block in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., connection, collision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_interactions_block_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("block_id_1") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_interactions_block_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("block_id_2") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "cpu_usage" INTEGER /* CPU usage of the server */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage of the server */,
  "tps" INTEGER /* Ticks per second (TPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
